creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #24)

Thanks for the callout for testing. I am now just getting around to
testing wine-devel-8.19,1 on some recentish 15-CURRENT. wine-devel on amd64
builds, however, i386 seems to be missing much pkg-plist items, from my
first initial poudriere-testport. Would you like me to submit a patch to
this existing BR, or submit a new report?

Thanks.
